headline: Lam Research Salzburg Lab Targets AI Packaging And Richly Valued Shares
summary: Lam Research is expanding into panel-level chip packaging with a new research lab in Salzburg, Austria. The lab focuses on raising chip density and reducing packaging cost as AI-related semiconductor demand grows. The move builds on acquired expertise and AI-driven upgrades to Lam’s existing tools and processes. For investors watching NasdaqGS:LRCX, this development sits alongside a share price of $302.24 and multi year returns of 63.3% year to date and 268.8% over the past year. The...
